title: Femboy PVP pack
description: This femboy themed resource pack adds: PVP utils like: low fire, small items, side shield, also survival tweaks like: outlined ores and transparent inventory
body:
This **Femboy** themed resource pack adds **PVP** utils like: low fire, small items, side shield, outlined cobs, also survival tweaks like: outlined ores and transparent inventory. You will feel yourself very cute while using this pack. This pack does not require any other mods.  

This resourse pack changes:
- Swords: diamond and netherite
- Pickaxes and axes: diamond and netherite
- Food: golden apples and golden carrots
- low fire
- armor: diamond and netherite
- Totem and pop sounds
- GUI
- Bow and crossbow

I hope you'll enjoy the pack, if you have any problems or if I should tweak something you can message me on discord. My discord username: femboy_furry_the_ii
